title: pilogyne elbertii
intro: Pilogyne elbertii, also known as Elbert's pilogyne, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Pilogyne elbertii are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
